hypotheses: <author-of-interest> shows family-level convergence in window <YYYY-MM> across families <list>
Per-family BH FDR yields >= 1 significant test for at least 5 of the 10 corpus authors
Section-conditioned drift removes the change-point under the section-adjusted pipeline
notes: Operator MUST fill in this file and commit BEFORE running a confirmatory analysis. Set locked_at + locked_by + config_hash + hypotheses to non-null before run. The analyze CLI inspects data/preregistration/preregistration_lock.json via verify_preregistration() — a missing or null-fielded lock causes the run to be logged as exploratory, not confirmatory. After editing, run `uv run forensics lock-preregistration` to populate the canonical analysis-threshold snapshot + content_hash and overwrite this template; the resulting file becomes the immutable confirmatory contract for the run that follows.
